notes: Focused benchmark manifest for the core-only mixed lower-glycolysis probe. Scores central glycolytic pacing and adenylate coupling while keeping purine and transport compensation closed.

cases.name: core_mid_horizon
cases.description: Primary probe case for the mixed lower-glycolysis and energy-coupling hypothesis.

cases.name: core_short_low_forcing
cases.description: Checks whether lower-glycolysis pacing improvement appears without stronger forcing.

cases.name: core_mid_horizon_soft_atp_guard
cases.description: Secondary diagnostic with a softer ATP guard to test whether the mixed probe immediately destabilizes adenylates.

cases.name: core_alt_seed
cases.description: Basic stochastic robustness check for the mixed lower-glycolysis probe.
